debug_info.goal:
f g : ℝ → ℝ
h₀ : ∀ (x y : ℝ), f (x + y) + f (x - y) = 2 * f x * g y
h₁ : ¬∀ (x : ℝ), f x = 0
h₂ : ∀ (x : ℝ), |f x| ≤ 1
⊢ ∀ (x : ℝ), |g x| ≤ 1

intro y
  let M := ⨆ x, |f x|
  have bdd : BddAbove (Set.range fun x => |f x|) := ⟨1, Set.forall_mem_range.mpr h₂⟩
  have hM_ub x : |f x| ≤ M := le_ciSup bdd x
  have hM_pos : 0 < M := by
    push_neg at h₁
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h₁
    exact (abs_pos.mpr hx).trans_le (hM_ub x)
  by_contra! hg
  have hM_le : M ≤ M / |g y| := ciSup_le fun x => by
    rw [le_div_iff (by linarith)]
    have h := congr_arg abs (h₀ x y)
    rw [abs_mul, abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by norm_num : (0:ℝ) < 2)] at h
    linarith [abs_add (f (x + y)) (f (x - y)), hM_ub (x + y), hM_ub (x - y)]
  have : M * |g y| ≤ M := (le_div_iff (by linarith)).mp hM_le
  exact hg.not_le (le_of_mul_le_mul_left this hM_pos)

    push_neg at h₁
    obtain ⟨x₀, hx₀⟩ := h₁
    exact (abs_pos.mpr hx₀).trans_le (le_csSup hS_bdd (Set.mem_range_self x₀))
  have h_ineq : ∀ x, |f x| * |g y| ≤ M := by
    intro x
    have hf := fun z => le_csSup hS_bdd (Set.mem_range_self z)
    have := calc
      2 * |f x| * |g y| = |2 * f x * g y| := by rw [abs_mul, abs_mul, abs_two, mul_assoc]
      _ = |f (x + y) + f (x - y)| := by rw [h₀]
      _ ≤ |f (x + y)| + |f (x - y)| := abs_add _ _
    linarith [hf (x + y), hf (x - y)]
  by_contra! h_gt
  have h_up : M ≤ M / |g y| := csSup_le (Set.range_nonempty _) (by
    rintro _ ⟨x, rfl⟩
    exact (le_div_iff (by linarith)).mpr (h_ineq x))
  exact h_up.not_lt (div_lt_self hM_pos h_gt)

intro y
  let S := ⨆ x, |f x|
  have hbdd : BoundedAbove (Set.range (fun x => |f x|)) := ⟨1, Set.forall_mem_range.mpr h₂⟩
  have hS_pos : 0 < S := by
    contrapose! h₁
    intro x
    have : |f x| ≤ 0 := (le_ciSup hbdd x).trans h₁
    linarith [abs_nonneg (f x)]
  have h_le : ∀ x, |f x| * |g y| ≤ S := fun x => by
    have h := h₀ x y
    have : 2 * |f x| * |g y| = |f (x + y) + f (x - y)| := by
      simp [abs_mul, ← h, abs_of_pos (show (0 : ℝ) < 2 by linarith)]
    linarith [abs_add (f (x + y)) (f (x - y)), le_ciSup hbdd (x + y), le_ciSup hbdd (x - y)]
  by_contra hg
  rw [not_le] at hg
  have : S ≤ S / |g y| := ciSup_le (fun x => (le_div_iff (lt_trans zero_lt_one hg)).mpr (h_le x))
  have : S * |g y| ≤ S := (le_div_iff (lt_trans zero_lt_one hg)).mp this
  linarith

intro y
  let M := ⨆ x, |f x|
  have hM_bdd : BddAbove (Set.range (λ x => |f x|)) := ⟨1, Set.forall_mem_range.mpr h₂⟩
  have h_pos : 0 < M := by
    by_contra! hM0
    exact h₁ (fun x => abs_eq_zero.mp (le_antisymm ((le_ciSup hM_bdd x).trans hM0) (abs_nonneg _)))
  have h_le : ∀ x, |f x| * |g y| ≤ M := fun x => by
    rw [← mul_le_mul_left (show (0 : ℝ) < 2 by norm_num), ← abs_of_pos (show (0 : ℝ) < 2 by norm_num),
        ← abs_mul, ← abs_mul, ← h₀]
    exact (abs_add ..).trans (add_le_add (le_ciSup hM_bdd (x + y)) (le_ciSup hM_bdd (x - y))).trans_eq (two_mul M).symm
  have hMg : M * |g y| ≤ M := by
    rw [← Real.iSup_mul_of_nonneg (abs_nonneg (g y))]
    exact ciSup_le (fun x => h_le x)
  exact (mul_le_iff_le_one_right h_pos).mp hMg

intro y
  let M := ⨆ x, |f x|
  have hb : BddAbove (Set.range (λ x => |f x|)) := ⟨1, by rintro _ ⟨x, rfl⟩; exact h₂ x⟩
  have hM_pos : 0 < M := by
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := not_forall.mp h₁
    exact (abs_pos.mpr hx).trans_le (le_ciSup hb x)
  by_cases hg : |g y| = 0
  · linarith
  · have hg_pos : 0 < |g y| := lt_of_le_of_ne (abs_nonneg (g y)) hg.symm
    have : ∀ x, |f x| ≤ M / |g y| := by
      intro x
      have h := h₀ x y
      apply_fun abs at h
      rw [abs_mul, abs_mul, abs_of_pos (show (0 : ℝ) < 2 by norm_num), ← mul_assoc] at h
      rw [le_div_iff hg_pos]
      linarith [abs_add (f (x + y)) (f (x - y)), le_ciSup hb (x + y), le_ciSup hb (x - y)]
    have hM_le : M ≤ M / |g y| := ciSup_le this
    rw [le_div_iff hg_pos] at hM_le
    linarith

intro x
  let M := ⨆ x, |f x|
  have hbdd : bddAbove (Set.range fun x => |f x|) := ⟨1, fun _ ⟨z, hz⟩ => hz ▸ h₂ z⟩
  have hM : 0 < M := by
    obtain ⟨x₀, hx₀⟩ := not_forall.mp h₁
    exact (abs_pos.mpr hx₀).trans_le (le_ciSup hbdd x₀)
  have h_fg : ∀ z, |f z| * |g x| ≤ M := fun z => by
    have h := congr_arg abs (h₀ z x)
    rw [abs_mul, abs_mul, abs_two, mul_assoc] at h
    have h_tri := (abs_add (f (z + x)) (f (z - x))).trans (add_le_add (le_ciSup hbdd (z + x)) (le_ciSup hbdd (z - x)))
    rw [h] at h_tri
    linarith
  by_contra! h
  have h_M_le : M ≤ M / |g x| := ciSup_le fun z => (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith : 0 < |g x|)).mpr (h_fg z)
  exact (div_lt_self hM h).not_le h_M_le

intro x
  let M := ⨆ y, |f y|
  have hM_bdd : BddAbove (Set.range (fun y => |f y|)) := ⟨1, Set.forall_mem_range.mpr h₂⟩
  have hM_pos : 0 < M := by
    obtain ⟨y₀, hy₀⟩ := not_forall.mp h₁
    exact (abs_pos.mpr hy₀).trans_le (le_ciSup hM_bdd y₀)
  have : M * |g x| ≤ M := by
    obtain hgx | hgx := (abs_nonneg (g x)).eq_or_lt
    · rw [← hgx, mul_zero]; exact hM_pos.le
    · rw [mul_comm, ← le_div_iff hgx]
      refine ciSup_le (fun y => (le_div_iff hgx).mpr ?_)
      have h_abs := congr_arg abs (h₀ y x)
      rw [abs_mul, abs_mul, abs_two] at h_abs
      linarith [abs_add (f (y + x)) (f (y - x)), le_ciSup hM_bdd (y + x), le_ciSup hM_bdd (y - x)]
  rw [← mul_one M] at this
  exact (mul_le_mul_left hM_pos).mp this

intro x
  by_contra hgx
  have hgx_pos : 0 < |g x| := (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1).trans (not_le.mp hgx)
  let S := ⨆ y, |f y|
  have bE : BddAbove (Set.range (fun y => |f y|)) := ⟨1, Set.forall_mem_range.mpr h₂⟩
  have hfS y : |f y| ≤ S := le_ciSup bE (Set.mem_range_self y)
  have hS_pos : 0 < S := by
    by_contra! hS_nonpos
    exact h₁ (fun y => abs_le_zero.mp ((hfS y).trans hS_nonpos))
  have hS_le_S : S ≤ S / |g x| := ciSup_le (fun y => (le_div_iff hgx_pos).mpr (by
    have h1 : 2 * |f y| * |g x| = |f (y + x) + f (y - x)| := by
      rw [← abs_of_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 2), ← abs_mul, ← abs_mul, ← h₀ y x]
    have h2 : |f (y + x) + f (y - x)| ≤ 2 * S :=
      (abs_add _ _).trans (add_le_add (hfS (y + x)) (hfS (y - x)))
    exact le_of_mul_le_mul_left (h1.trans_le h2) (by norm_num)))
  have : |g x| ≤ 1 := by
    have hS_mul : S * |g x| ≤ S := (le_div_iff hgx_pos).mp hS_le_S
    rwa [le_div_iff' hS_pos, div_self (ne_of_gt hS_pos)] at hS_mul
  exact hgx this

intro y
  let M := ⨆ x, |f x|
  have hf_bdd : BddAbove (Set.range fun x => |f x|) := ⟨1, fun _ ⟨x, hx⟩ => hx ▸ h₂ x⟩
  have hM_pos : 0 < M := by
    push_neg at h₁; obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h₁
    exact (abs_pos.mpr hx).trans_le (le_ciSup hf_bdd x)
  by_contra! hg
  have : ∀ x, |f x| ≤ M / |g y| := by
    intro x
    have h : 2 * |f x| * |g y| = |f (x + y) + f (x - y)| := by
      rw [← abs_mul, ← abs_mul, abs_of_pos (show (0:ℝ) < 2 by norm_num), h₀]
    linarith [abs_add (f (x + y)) (f (x - y)), le_ciSup hf_bdd (x + y), le_ciSup hf_bdd (x - y)]
  have hM_bound : M ≤ M / |g y| := ciSup_le this
  have : M * |g y| ≤ M := (le_div_iff (by linarith)).mp hM_bound
  have : M < M * |g y| := (mul_lt_mul_left hM_pos).mpr hg
  linarith

intro y
  let M := ⨆ x, |f x|
  have hM_bdd : BddAbove (Set.range (fun x => |f x|)) := ⟨1, by rintro _ ⟨x, rfl⟩; exact h₂ x⟩
  have hM_pos : 0 < M := by
    rcases not_forall.mp h₁ with ⟨x₀, hx₀⟩
    exact (abs_pos.mpr hx₀).trans_le (le_ciSup hM_bdd x₀)
  have : M * |g y| ≤ M := by
    by_cases hg : |g y| = 0
    · linarith
    · have hg_pos : 0 < |g y| := (abs_nonneg _).lt_of_ne (Ne.symm hg)
      rw [← le_div_iff hg_pos]
      apply ciSup_le (Nonempty.intro 0)
      intro x
      rw [le_div_iff hg_pos, mul_comm]
      have h_abs := congr_arg abs (h₀ x y)
      rw [abs_mul, abs_mul, (show |(2:ℝ)| = 2 by norm_num), mul_assoc] at h_abs
      linarith [abs_add (f (x + y)) (f (x - y)), le_ciSup hM_bdd (x + y), le_ciSup hM_bdd (x - y)]
  exact (mul_le_iff_le_one_right hM_pos).mp this

have bdd : BddAbove (Set.range fun x => |f x|) := ⟨1, Set.forall_range_iff.mpr h₂⟩
  let S := ⨆ x, |f x|
  have hS : ∀ x, |f x| ≤ S := le_ciSup bdd
  have hSp : 0 < S := by
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := not_forall.mp h₁
    exact (abs_pos.mpr hx).trans_le (le_ciSup bdd x)
  intro y
  by_contra! hg
  have hg0 : 0 < |g y| := zero_lt_one.trans hg
  have hSgy : S ≤ S / |g y| := ciSup_le (fun x => by
    rw [le_div_iff hg0, ← mul_le_mul_left zero_lt_two, mul_assoc, ← abs_mul, ← h₀]
    exact (abs_add (f (x + y)) (f (x - y))).trans (add_le_add (hS (x + y)) (hS (x - y))) |>.trans_eq (two_mul S).symm)
  have : |g y| ≤ 1 := (mul_le_mul_left hSp).mp ((le_div_iff hg0).mp hSgy |>.trans_eq (mul_one S).symm)
  exact hg.not_le this

intro y
  let M := ⨆ x, |f x|
  have hb : BddAbove (Set.range (fun x => |f x|)) := ⟨1, Set.forall_mem_range.mpr h₂⟩
  have hM : ∀ x, |f x| ≤ M := le_ciSup hb
  have Mp : 0 < M := by
    obtain ⟨x, hfx⟩ := not_forall.mp h₁
    exact (abs_pos.mpr hfx).trans_le (hM x)
  have h_mul : ∀ x, |f x| * |g y| ≤ M := fun x => by
    have h := congr_arg abs (h₀ x y)
    simp only [abs_mul, abs_of_pos (zero_lt_two : (0 : ℝ) < 2), ← mul_assoc] at h
    refine (mul_le_mul_left (zero_lt_two : (0 : ℝ) < 2)).mp (h.trans_le ?_)
    exact (abs_add (f (x + y)) (f (x - y))).trans (add_le_add (hM (x + y)) (hM (x - y)))
  by_contra hgy
  have hgt : 1 < |g y| := not_le.mp hgy
  have h_bound : ∀ x, |f x| ≤ M / |g y| := fun x => (le_div_iff₀ (zero_lt_one.trans hgt)).mpr (h_mul x)
  have : M ≤ M / |g y| := ciSup_le h_bound
  exact (div_lt_self Mp hgt).not_le this

intro y
  let S := ⨆ x, |f x|
  have hb : BddAbove (Set.range (fun x => |f x|)) := ⟨1, fun _ ⟨x, hx⟩ => hx ▸ h₂ x⟩
  have hS : 0 < S := by
    contrapose! h₁
    intro x
    exact abs_eq_zero.mp (by linarith [le_ciSup hb x, abs_nonneg (f x)])
  have h_bound : ∀ x', |f x'| * |g y| ≤ S := fun x' => by
    have : 2 * |f x'| * |g y| = |f (x' + y) + f (x' - y)| := by
      rw [abs_mul, abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 2), mul_assoc, h₀]
    linarith [abs_add (f (x' + y)) (f (x' - y)), le_ciSup hb (x' + y), le_ciSup hb (x' - y)]
  have : S * |g y| ≤ S := by
    by_cases hgy : |g y| = 0
    · linarith
    · have hgy_pos : 0 < |g y| := (abs_nonneg (g y)).lt_of_ne (Ne.symm hgy)
      exact (le_div_iff₀ hgy_pos).mp (ciSup_le (fun x' => (le_div_iff₀ hgy_pos).mpr (h_bound x')))
  exact (mul_le_mul_left hS).mp (this.trans_eq (mul_one S).symm)

intro x
  by_contra! hg
  let S := Set.range (fun y => |f y|)
  have hS_bdd : BddAbove S := ⟨1, by rintro _ ⟨y, rfl⟩; exact h₂ y⟩
  set M := sSup S
  have hM_ub y : |f y| ≤ M := le_csSup hS_bdd ⟨y, rfl⟩
  have hM_pos : 0 < M := by
    push_neg at h₁; obtain ⟨y₀, hy₀⟩ := h₁
    exact (abs_pos.mpr hy₀).trans_le (hM_ub y₀)
  have hM_le : M ≤ M / |g x| := by
    apply csSup_le (Set.range_nonempty _)
    rintro _ ⟨y, rfl⟩
    rw [le_div_iff₀ (by linarith), ← abs_two, ← abs_mul, ← abs_mul, ← h₀ y x]
    linarith [abs_add (f (y + x)) (f (y - x)), hM_ub (y + x), hM_ub (y - x)]
  have : M * |g x| ≤ M := (le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)).mp hM_le
  linarith
